landing.landing.hero.headline: Clarity for expats facing UAE legal, financial, and immigration issues.
landing.landing.hero.sub: An AI-assisted intake platform that helps you understand your situation, organises your documents, and connects you to licensed UAE lawyers and experts for the actual work. We are not a law firm — we help you start smart.
landing.landing.hero.trust: Free initial questionnaire · No card required · Takes about 5 minutes
landing.landing.hero.disclaimer: Free initial questionnaire. No legal advice is provided by ExpatUAE. All legal work is handled by independent licensed UAE lawyers.
landing.landing.how.title: A clear, step-by-step path forward
landing.landing.how.subtitle: Nothing happens instantly — each step is honest about timing.
landing.landing.how.s1.title: Tell us your situation
landing.landing.how.s1.desc: Answer a structured questionnaire about your issue. Free, confidential, takes 5–10 minutes.
landing.landing.how.s2.title: Get an AI-assisted summary
landing.landing.how.s2.desc: Our AI reviews your inputs and produces a structured summary. Informational only — not legal advice.
landing.landing.how.s3.title: Choose a paid report (optional)
landing.landing.how.s3.desc: A deeper written analysis that organises your facts, flags risk areas, and prepares a clean handover document.
landing.landing.how.s4.title: Connect with a licensed professional
landing.landing.how.s4.desc: If you choose, we introduce you to a licensed UAE law firm or expert. They work independently — not as our employees.
landing.landing.how.callout.label: Why this matters:
landing.landing.how.callout.text: You stay in control at every step. We help you start; a qualified professional handles the legal work.
landing.landing.benefits.title: Why expats use ExpatUAE
landing.landing.benefits.b1.title: Clarity before you spend
landing.landing.benefits.b1.desc: A structured summary of your situation before you pay a single dirham to anyone — including us.
landing.landing.benefits.b2.title: Less paperwork chaos
landing.landing.benefits.b2.desc: Upload your documents once. We organise them so a lawyer can review them faster, which often means lower fees for you.
landing.landing.benefits.b3.title: Right professional, first time
landing.landing.benefits.b3.desc: Our matching considers practice area, language, and jurisdiction so you don't waste consultation fees on the wrong specialist.
landing.landing.benefits.b4.title: Confidential by design
landing.landing.benefits.b4.desc: Your data is encrypted, access is role-restricted, and we never sell your information. You can delete your account at any time.
landing.landing.benefits.b5.title: Transparent pricing
landing.landing.benefits.b5.desc: You see the AI report cost upfront. If you choose a lawyer introduction, any referral arrangement is disclosed.
landing.landing.benefits.b6.title: Built for expats
landing.landing.benefits.b6.desc: Arabic, English, Hindi, Urdu, and Tagalog — the languages actually spoken by UAE residents.
landing.landing.ai.title: Realistic AI capabilities — no overpromises
landing.landing.ai.subtitle: Our AI helps organise your situation — it does not replace a licensed lawyer.
landing.landing.ai.c1: Read a structured description of your issue and produce a clear written summary.
landing.landing.ai.c2: Extract key information from documents you upload: parties, dates, reference numbers, amounts, and obligations.
landing.landing.ai.c3: Suggest the type of professional who typically handles your kind of issue.
landing.landing.ai.c4: Prepare a clean handover document that saves a lawyer time reviewing your file.
landing.landing.ai.c5: Flag obvious missing information you may want to gather before speaking to a lawyer.
landing.landing.ai.n1: Give you legal advice or a legal opinion.
landing.landing.ai.n2: Predict the outcome of any case, claim, or dispute.
landing.landing.ai.n3: Tell you whether you will win, lose, or settle.
landing.landing.ai.n4: Replace a licensed lawyer's review of your specific circumstances.
landing.landing.ai.n5: Communicate with any court, bank, employer, or government entity on your behalf.
landing.landing.ai.accuracyText: AI can make mistakes. Always verify any extracted figures, dates, or reference numbers against your original documents. For anything that affects your legal, financial, or immigration status, rely on the written advice of a licensed UAE professional — not on AI output.
landing.landing.pricing.title: Transparent, tiered pricing
landing.landing.pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pay only when you want a deeper analysis. Lawyer fees are separate and set by the lawyer.
landing.landing.pricing.free.name: Free
landing.landing.pricing.free.desc: Start here if you're not sure what you need.
landing.landing.pricing.basic.name: Basic
landing.landing.pricing.basic.f3: Document intelligence on up to 3 files
landing.landing.pricing.basic.f4: Clean handover PDF to share with any lawyer
landing.landing.pricing.standard.name: Standard
landing.landing.pricing.standard.desc: AI report + lawyer matching + intro call
landing.landing.pricing.standard.f2: Matching to a licensed UAE law firm or expert
landing.landing.pricing.standard.f3: Introductory call with matched professional (15–30 min)
landing.landing.pricing.standard.f4: Document handover to the lawyer (with your consent)
landing.landing.pricing.standard.f5: The lawyer confirms if they can take your case and their fees
landing.landing.pricing.premium.name: Premium
landing.landing.pricing.premium.f3: Support preparing your file for the lawyer
landing.landing.pricing.premium.f4: Follow-up summary if your situation changes
landing.landing.pricing.premium.f5: Best for multi-issue or time-sensitive matters
landing.landing.pricing.monetizationText: We earn through assessment fees paid by users for paid reports. When you choose to engage a lawyer we introduce you to, we may also receive a referral fee from that law firm. This does not increase what you pay the lawyer and is disclosed before you commit to anything.
landing.landing.pricing.monetizationNote: No hidden fees. You will always see the price before you pay. Lawyer fees are set by the lawyer and agreed directly between you and them.
landing.landing.pricing.disclaimer: Paid reports are informational products, not legal advice. Lawyer fees are separate and are set by the lawyer. ExpatUAE may receive a referral fee from partner firms when you engage them; this is disclosed before you commit.
landing.landing.lawyers.title: Receive qualified, pre-screened leads
landing.landing.lawyers.subtitle: ExpatUAE sends you cases that have already been through structured intake and AI-assisted summarisation. You spend less time on fact-finding calls and more time on actual legal work.
landing.landing.lawyers.send.s1: A clean intake summary covering issue type, parties, timeline, and documents.
landing.landing.lawyers.send.s3: The user's preferred language and contact preferences.
landing.landing.lawyers.send.s4: Confirmation that the user has consented to share their file with you.
landing.landing.lawyers.dont.d1: We don't give the user legal advice on your behalf.
landing.landing.lawyers.dont.d2: We don't represent users in court or in negotiations.
landing.landing.lawyers.dont.d3: We don't set your fees, manage your caseload, or supervise your work.
landing.landing.lawyers.dont.d4: We don't take a percentage of your professional fees — only an optional pre-agreed referral fee, disclosed to the user.
landing.landing.lawyers.complianceText: ExpatUAE does not practise law, employ lawyers, or split legal fees. Every partner firm operates independently under its own professional licence.
landing.landing.lawyers.onboardingText: If you're a licensed UAE law firm or a regulated professional, apply to join the network. We verify licence status with the UAE Ministry of Justice before listing any partner. Onboarding typically takes 5–10 business days.
landing.landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.landing.faq.a1: No. We are a technology platform that provides AI-assisted intake and connects users to independent licensed UAE lawyers and experts.
landing.landing.faq.q2: Will I get legal advice from ExpatUAE?
landing.landing.faq.a2: No. Our AI summaries are informational only. For legal advice, you need to speak with a licensed UAE lawyer — which we can help arrange.
landing.landing.faq.q3: Do you guarantee a specific outcome?
landing.landing.faq.a3: No. No one can guarantee the outcome of a legal matter. Anyone who promises you a result is not being honest.
landing.landing.faq.a4: The basic questionnaire is free. Paid AI reports start at AED 299. Lawyer fees are separate and are set by the lawyer.
landing.landing.faq.a5: Yes. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit, access is restricted, and we never sell your information. You can request deletion at any time.
landing.landing.faq.a6: Arabic, English, Hindi, Urdu, and Tagalog.
landing.landing.faq.q7: Can I use my own lawyer instead of one of yours?
landing.landing.faq.a7: Yes. The paid AI report includes a clean PDF you can share with any lawyer of your choosing.
landing.landing.finalCta.title: Start with clarity
landing.landing.finalCta.subtitle: Take the free 5-minute questionnaire. Get a clear summary of your situation. Decide your next step with confidence.
landing.landing.finalCta.disclaimer: ExpatUAE is not a law firm. AI outputs are informational only and are not legal advice.
landing.landing.footer.disclaimer: ExpatUAE is a technology platform, not a law firm. We do not provide legal advice and do not guarantee any outcome. All legal work is performed by independent licensed UAE professionals. Using ExpatUAE does not create a lawyer–client relationship between you and ExpatUAE.
landing.landing.sticky.text: Not sure where to start? Try the free assessment.
